title: Naturalized Citizen Excluded From Federal Office

violations.source: Article IX Section 1.1 and Section 4.1 through Section 4.3
violations.summary: A federal statute bars naturalized citizens from holding a non-presidential federal office, creating a blanket civic disability based on the manner of citizenship.

satisfied_duties.duty: resolve the challenge to the exclusion of naturalized citizens from federal office
satisfied_duties.outcome: voided the blanket exclusion and restored equal eligibility for the federal office at issue

ai_summary.primary_violation: A federal statute bars naturalized citizens from holding a non-presidential federal office, creating a blanket civic disability based on the manner of citizenship.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
